Home / Service Areas / Annapolis

Excavation contractor in Annapolis, MD

Trusted local professionals serving Annapolis and surrounding communities

Serving Annapolis, MD

P & J Contracting Co Inc is proud to serve the historic city of Annapolis, Maryland, with our expert excavation services. Home to many Colonial and Federal-style homes, especially in the downtown area, Annapolis requires a sensitive approach to excavation projects. We understand the importance of preserving the historical integrity of this charming city while providing modern solutions. Our team has extensive experience working in Annapolis, navigating the unique challenges of excavating around historic structures. We are committed to providing exceptional customer service and ensuring that every project is completed with the utmost care and attention to detail. From foundation repairs to drainage improvements, P & J Contracting Co Inc is your trusted partner for all your excavation needs in Annapolis.

Annapolis, MD is a historic city known for its Colonial architecture and maritime history. Annapolis experiences hot, humid summers and is located on the Chesapeake Bay.

Excavation contractor Services in Annapolis

Site Preparation

Comprehensive site preparation services for residential and commercial projects.

Learn more →

Excavation & Grading

Precise excavation and grading services for residential, commercial, and industrial projects.

Learn more →

Drainage Systems

Effective drainage solutions to protect your property from water damage.

Learn more →

Foundation Excavation

Expert foundation excavation services for new construction and additions.

Learn more →

Utility Trenching

Safe and efficient utility trenching services for water, sewer, and gas lines.

Learn more →

Demolition Services

Safe and efficient demolition services for residential and commercial structures.

Learn more →
